UNLHA 0.1 - LZH/LHA unpacker for Sprinter DSS
Author: Dmitry Mikhalchenkov (SprinterTeam)

DESCRIPTION
  UNLHA unpacks LZH/LHA archives on Sprinter DSS. Supported compression
  methods: -lh0-/-lz4- (stored), -lh5- (AR002), -lh1- (LZHUF). Header
  levels 0 and 1, including Amiga archives (directories and long names).
  Integrity is verified with CRC16/ARC over the uncompressed data.

USAGE
  unlha.exe <archive.lzh> [<out_dir>] [<mask>]        unpack
  unlha.exe -l <archive.lzh> [<list_file>] [<mask>]   list (screen or file)
  unlha.exe -o <archive.lzh> [<out_dir>] [<mask>]     overwrite existing
  unlha.exe -s <archive.lzh> [<out_dir>] [<mask>]     skip existing
  unlha.exe -x <archive.lzh> [<out_dir>] <mask>       strip mask dir prefix

OPTIONS (prefix - or /, single letter)
  -l  list archive contents (no extraction)
  -o  overwrite existing files without asking
  -s  skip existing files without asking
  -x  strip the mask's directory prefix from names (a mask is required)

OUTPUT DIRECTORY
  Default is the current directory. A positional <out_dir> is made
  absolute. If the second argument contains a wildcard it is treated as a
  mask and output goes to the current directory. Subdirectories stored in
  the archive are created automatically.

MASKS
  *  matches any sequence, ?  matches one character. Case-insensitive;
  / and \ are equivalent. A mask ending in \ or / means "all files in
  that directory".

LISTING (-l)
  Without <list_file> the listing is printed to the screen with a page
  pause (Esc stops). With a file name it is written to a text file.
  Columns: method, packed size, original size, date and time, name.

OVERWRITE PROMPT
  Without -o/-s, when a file already exists you are asked:
    Overwrite? y/n, a=all, s=skip
  y - overwrite this file, n - skip it, a - overwrite all,
  s - skip all, Esc/Ctrl+C - abort.

INTERRUPT
  Esc or Ctrl+C aborts listing and extraction (prints "Aborted",
  return code 1).

RETURN CODES
  0   success
  1   bad command line, or interrupted (Esc/Ctrl+C)
  3   archive not found
  7   output file exists and was not replaced
  13  damaged or unknown LZH format
  23  CRC16 mismatch
  other - the DSS error code is passed through

NOTES
  File names are converted to DOS 8.3 (base up to 8, extension up to 3);
  characters not allowed in 8.3 become '_'. Methods -lh4-/-lh6-/-lh7-
  and -lzs-/-lz5-, and header levels 2 and 3, are not supported.

PACKAGE
  unlha.exe    - the program
  unlhaen.txt  - this file (English)
  unlha.txt    - description in Russian (CP866)
